method: Apply the same per-view A01 axis scale to C-003 and C-004 so CL-003 remains coincident, then solve the one diagnostic translation that minimizes C-003 displacement at fixed CL-002 samples. Nonzero residual proves exact CL-002 preservation is impossible.

view_audits.diagnostic_translation_authority: none; least-squares analytic term only, not center/pivot/anchor/geometry

controlling_failure: Scaling C-003 with C-004 can preserve CL-003, but the non-identity scale moves different CL-002 samples by different amounts. One translation cannot keep C-003 coincident with unchanged C-002 at every exact sample.
